_sample.how_mode_is_detected: Use this when garments/og/<id>.jpg exists and garments/og/<id>/ does not exist.
input_files: archetypes.single_garment_models folder with one or more model/avatar images
flow: Normalize the single garment image to garments/og/<id>.normalized.jpg.
Try that one garment on every model image in archetypes.single_garment_models.
Build a reel from the normalized garment intro, generated VTO images, and optional end card.
_sample.copy_hint: Copy this file to code/input/<id>.json, then replace paths and text for the run.

vto.prompt: virtual try on. show the garment naturally fitted on the model. preserve realistic fabric, garment details, lighting, proportions, and full outfit visibility.
